content: The interface is fine but the feed content is inconsistent sometimes

The Instagram interface is fine but the constant changes make it hard to learn where everything is located I notice that the new features sometimes slow down the app experience for me I don't see a major difference in the content I consume so I am just waiting for more stable updates instead of constant new additions
The interface is fine the photos load okay sometimes.
The interface looks fine but the feed loading time seems slower than before I noticed a slight delay when scrolling through the stories it is okay just a little bit
The new interface is functional but the loading speed has been inconsistent lately
The new feed algorithm is fine but sometimes the suggested content is not what I am looking for

The new feed algorithm seems to be working fine I noticed a slight delay when loading videos from certain accounts but overall the experience is acceptable I have not encountered any major bugs yet so I will continue using the application as usual thank you
The new interface looks different but it functions as expected the feed loads fine however the navigation sometimes takes a moment to respond
The interface has changed a bit and I am still getting my content but the navigation feels slightly confusing sometimes

The new updates to Instagram changed the feed layout I noticed a difference in how the stories section loads it is slower than before but the overall experience is acceptable
